title: stelis habrostachya
intro: Stelis habrostachya, also known as the "Saw-tooth Stelis," is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Stelis habrostachya has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health problems.
